about.title: About Body Good Studio
about.subtitle: Physician-led weight loss care that meets you where you are.
about.drLindaBio: Dr. Linda founded Body Good Studio with a simple mission: make effective weight loss treatment accessible, affordable, and personal. As a board-certified physician who understands the weight loss journey firsthand, she built a practice that treats every patient like family.
about.teamDescription: Our team includes Dr. Sharmaine, Jena PA, and Rhea PA — all experienced in telehealth weight management. Every treatment plan is personally reviewed by a licensed provider.
about.value1Description: Every prescription is written by a board-certified physician or licensed PA. No algorithms. No shortcuts.
about.value2Description: What you see is what you pay. No hidden membership fees. No surprise charges.
about.value3Description: We serve our community in English and Spanish because healthcare should never have a language barrier.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From quiz to prescription in 4 simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Description: Answer a few questions about your health goals. We'll recommend the right program for you.
howItWorks.step2Description: Pick your medication and commitment tier. Transparent, all-inclusive pricing — no hidden fees.
howItWorks.step3Description: After checkout, complete a brief medical form. A licensed provider reviews your history within 24 hours.
howItWorks.step4Description: Once approved, your medication ships directly to your door. Your care team is available for questions anytime.
